subject: [PATCH v6 05/10] mm/memory_hotplug: add __add_memory_driver_managed() with online_type arg

2026-06-30.patch_summary: This patch adds a new function, __add_memory_driver_managed(), which allows drivers to select the preferred online type (ZONE_NORMAL or ZONE_MOVABLE) when adding memory. The CXL driver requires this feature to plumb its own policy through the dax kmem driver. The new function is restricted to in-tree modules using EXPORT_SYMBOL_FOR_MODULES() and does not override the system-wide onlining policy. Existing APIs are refactored to use the new helper, with no functional changes for existing users.
